## Summary

- 

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/release
- [ ] Refactor

## Test Results

- [ ] `npm.cmd run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm.cmd run lint`
- [ ] `npm.cmd run i18n:check`
- [ ] `npm.cmd run license:check`
- [ ] `npm.cmd run smoke`
- [ ] `npm.cmd run build`
- [ ] `npm.cmd audit --omit=dev`

## UI / Screenshots

- [ ] No UI change
- [ ] Screenshots or screen recordings included

## i18n

- [ ] No user-facing text change
- [ ] Korean and English locale files updated

## Documentation

- [ ] No documentation change needed
- [ ] README/docs/release notes updated

## Release Impact

- [ ] No release impact
- [ ] Release notes/changelog needed
- [ ] Packaging or GitHub Actions affected

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No user assets, test libraries, SQLite DB files, `.env` files, tokens, certificates, or keys are included.
- [ ] No renderer direct access to `fs`, `sharp`, or `better-sqlite3`.
- [ ] Existing library compatibility is preserved.
